privacyPolicy.title: Privacy policy
privacyPolicy.description: View the temporary privacy policy for the Visia website.
privacyPolicy.intro: This temporary privacy policy explains how Visia collects, uses and protects personal data when you use the website.

dataCollected.title: Data collected
body: We may collect data that you voluntarily provide, such as your name, email address or information submitted through a contact form.
We may also collect technical data such as IP address, browser used, device type and browsing information.

purposes.title: Purposes of processing
body: Collected data is used to respond to your requests, improve the website, ensure its security and measure its audience.
It may also be used to contact you again in relation to a request you initiated.

retention.title: Retention period
body: Data is kept for a limited period that is proportionate to the purpose of processing.
Contact data is kept for as long as necessary to manage the relationship, unless a different legal obligation applies.

sharing.title: Data sharing
body: Data is not sold to third parties.
It may be shared with strictly authorized technical providers when necessary for hosting, maintenance or operation of the website.

rights.title: Your rights
body: Under applicable regulations, you have rights of access, rectification, erasure, objection, restriction and portability where applicable.
You can exercise these rights by contacting us at: contact@visia.example.

returnPolicy.title: Return policy
returnPolicy.description: View the temporary return policy for the Visia website.
returnPolicy.intro: This temporary return policy describes the rules that apply to any orders or services offered by Visia.

scope.title: Scope
body: This policy applies to products and services sold by Visia through its website or by quote, subject to any specific terms stated at the time of ordering.
Some digital services performed immediately may not be refundable where allowed by law.

withdrawal.title: Right of withdrawal
body: Where applicable, the right of withdrawal may be exercised within the legal timeframe from the conclusion of the contract or receipt of the product.
To exercise this right, you may contact us at: contact@visia.example.

refunds.title: Refunds
body: Once the request has been approved, the refund is made using the same payment method used for the order, unless otherwise agreed.
Processing times may vary depending on the bank or payment provider.

exceptions.title: Exceptions
body: Services already fully performed, digital content supplied without a physical medium after express consent, or personalized services may be excluded from refunds under applicable law.
Each offer may include specific rules that prevail when clearly stated before purchase.

termsAndConditions.title: Terms and conditions
termsAndConditions.description: View the temporary terms and conditions for the Visia website.
termsAndConditions.intro: These temporary terms and conditions govern access to the Visia website and, where applicable, subscription to its services.

acceptance.title: Acceptance
body: Use of the website implies full acceptance of these terms and conditions.
If you do not accept these terms, you should not use the website.

services.title: Services offered
body: Visia provides services related to analyzing brand visibility and perception in responses generated by artificial intelligence systems.
The essential characteristics of each offer are presented on the website or communicated before any subscription.

userObligations.title: User obligations
body: The user agrees to provide accurate information and to use the website in a fair, lawful and appropriate manner.
Any abusive, fraudulent or rights-infringing use may result in suspension of access.

availability.title: Service availability
body: Visia makes reasonable efforts to keep the website accessible, without guaranteeing uninterrupted or continuous availability.
Maintenance operations, updates or technical incidents may temporarily affect access.

limitation.title: Limitation of liability
body: Visia shall not be liable for indirect damages or losses resulting from use of the website, to the extent permitted by law.
Visia shall not be liable in cases of misuse of the service or external events beyond its control.
